news.t: OneAscent Launches Small Cap ETF, Bolstering its Suite of Values-Aligned, Index-Based Solutions

holdings.infoBox: OASC is an equity ETF with a total of 184 individual holdings. The top holdings are Us Dollars stock at 3.36%, Sandisk at 3.21%, Clearway Energy at 1.86%, CNA Financial at 1.73%, and Ralph Lauren at 1.63%.

overview.description: The OneAscent Enhanced Small and Mid Cap ETF (OASC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 index. The fund is actively managed to invest in 200 small- and mid-cap companies in the US. Security selection uses a proprietary, value-based screening process OASC was launched on Jun 13, 2024 and is issued by Oneascent.

data.title: OneAscent Launches Small Cap ETF, Bolstering its Suite of Values-Aligned, Index-Based Solutions
data.text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. , June 13, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- OneAscent Investment Solutions is proud to announce the latest addition to its suite of values-aligned investment offerings: the OneAscent Small Cap Co...
